title: SRS Repository Manifest (ext:repository)
description: Root file for a SRS ext:repository. Acts as the authoritative index and entry point for the repository. Every repository must have exactly one manifest.json at its root.

srsVersion.description: SRS spec version this repository conforms to, e.g. '2.0' or '2.0-draft'.

repositoryId.description: Stable UUID for this repository. Never changes on copy or export.

namespace.description: Reverse-DNS namespace for this repository, e.g. 'com.semanticops.srs'.

declaredExtensions.description: SRS extensions this repository conforms to, e.g. ['ext:lifecycle', 'ext:views-l1', 'ext:views-l2'].

container.description: Embedded Container record. Canonical source of truth for this repository's identity.

containerIndex.description: Index of all Containers in this repository.

packageRef.description: Reference to the SRS Package that supplies field and type definitions (single package).

packageRefs.description: References to one or more SRS Packages that supply field and type definitions. Use instead of packageRef when multiple packages are in scope.

instanceIndex.description: Authoritative list of all instances in this repository. Files not listed here are not members.

relationsPath.description: Relative path from manifest.json to the relations collection file.

sourceDocumentsPath.description: Relative path from manifest.json to the source-documents/ directory.

sourceDocumentIndex.description: Optional explicit index of source documents.

relationsChecksums.description: Optional checksums for each relations file. Enables fast no-op detection during re-import.

federationPath.description: ext:federation only. Path to the RepositoryRegistry file. Default: 'federation/registry.json'.

federationEventsPath.description: ext:federation only. Path to the FederationEventsFile. Default: 'federation/events.json'.

aiGuidance.description: Comprehension guidance for AI agents reading this repository.

meta.description: Implementation-local key-value pairs. Common keys: 'sourceOfTruth', 'renderedExports'. Cross-system keys should be namespaced.

path.description: Relative path from manifest.json to the container file.

mode.description: 'local': definitions live in the repository under package/. 'external': definitions are expected pre-installed in the consumer's registry.

path.description: Relative path to the package directory or package.json (local mode).

packageName.description: Human-readable name of the external package (external mode).

packageVersion.description: Semver of the external package (external mode).

path.description: Relative path from manifest.json to the instance file.
